rule_context.rule: VOLATILE + AST tier >= T6 = hard skip regardless of hit rate or elite playmaker exemption

rule_context.note: REB T12: 8/10 overall but vs_soft=65%, competitive=68%, blowout=59% — all below 70% system threshold in key splits. REB 78% minimum floor requires 78%+ confidence; after applying split adjustments, cannot reach 78% floor. T10 not a valid REB tier. Skip entirely.

rule_context.rule: VOLATILE + AST tier >= T6 = hard skip regardless of hit rate
spread_abs >= 15 AND player on favored side → PTS T25 hard skip

rule_context.note: FG_MARGIN_THIN below 10% safety floor at T20; mandatory step to T15. Pick emitted at T15.

PTS T15: overall=70% (7/10) BUT competitive=55% materially below 70% system threshold. B2B game with min_floor=14.7 < 24 → mandatory step T15→T10. At T10: hit rate sufficient but min_floor<24 requires step from T15; T10 is the step-down destination. However, min_floor=14.7 is extremely thin — below even 20-minute threshold for REB/AST caution. Additionally B2B rate at T15=78% but competitive=55% creates structural concern. Emitting as skip due to min_floor extreme fragility at T15 tier; no T10 PTS pick emitted as the competitive suppression risk remains real even at T10 given min_floor=14.7.

VOLATILE tag present. At T4 with soft opponent, AST hard gate passes for position/defense. However VOLATILE + AST evaluation: T4 is below T6 threshold so VOLATILE+T6 hard block does not fire. Hit rate=75% (7/10) VOLATILE → -5% → 70% floor exactly. Borderline — trend=down applies no mandatory step for AST but with VOLATILE deduction landing exactly at 70% floor with no margin, and bb_lift=1.11 on miss side, skip on merit (insufficient margin).
